name: cisco_asa
explanation: Cisco ASA is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template (tcp/udp syslog with `<PORT>` placeholder) and there is no Agent check class under `datadog_checks/cisco_asa/` (only `__init__.py` exposing `__version__`). Setup is configuring `logging host ... tcp/<port>` on the ASA CLI to forward syslog to the Datadog Agent listener. There is no metrics endpoint to probe, no upstream host/port to autodiscover, and the listener port is operator policy. Identical shape to cisco_secure_firewall.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only). No check.py exists; integration is a logs config + manifest only.
